spec_required: Cañahueca bamboo OD ~1.0-in bore ~0.75-in wall ~0.125-in; 10-ft blanks minimum; straight grain no cracks
supplier_candidates: Bamboo Craftsman (US); Tropical Bamboo (FL); Amazon - bamboo tube bulk
search_terms: bamboo cane tube 1 inch bore panflute
substitute_risk: PVC ID may be slightly oversized vs 0.75-in bore spec; recalculate lengths if actual ID differs

supplier_candidates: Home Depot; Lowes; local plumbing supply
substitute_risk: PVC adds slight weight; tone quality differs from bamboo; adequate for prototyping

spec_required: Cañahueca bamboo OD ~0.82-in bore ~0.625-in; 10-ft blanks; straight consistent bore

substitute_risk: Minimal substitution risk if actual PVC ID verified

spec_required: PVC Schedule 40 3/4-in nominal (actual ID ~0.622-in); verify with calipers
